description: AI-powered life insurance claim validation that analyzes identity documents, death certificates, and policy records to produce a GO / NO_GO / REFER decision on claim processing

agents.name: Document Intake Agent
agents.description: Classifies submitted documents and extracts structured data using Amazon Textract OCR and Bedrock multimodal vision analysis

agents.name: Identity Verification Agent
agents.description: Cross-references extracted identity data across all submitted documents to verify consistency and detect potential fraud indicators

agents.name: Claim Validity Agent
agents.description: Validates policy status, confirms beneficiary entitlement, and verifies death certificate authenticity against extracted data
